<!-- stdix:start -->
## Applied stdix standards

### Python CLI Standard (python.cli v1.0.0)

- Use Typer for CLI command definitions.
- Use Rich for terminal output.
- Use pathlib instead of os.path.
- Use pytest for tests.
- Use ruff for linting and formatting.
- Every command must support --help.
- Long-running commands should show progress indicators.
- User-facing errors should be formatted clearly.
<!-- stdix:end -->
